payload.label: clock
payload.long_description: Wall-mounted analog clock with a white face, black Roman numerals and black hands set in a dark scalloped glossy frame that appears metal or painted wood; image is slightly blurred and low-resolution, estimated camera distance ~2.0 meters.

message.content: {"label":"clock","short_description":"white-faced wall clock, dark scalloped","long_description":"Wall-mounted analog clock with a white face, black Roman numerals and black hands set in a dark scalloped glossy frame that appears metal or painted wood; image is slightly blurred and low-resolution, estimated camera distance ~2.0 meters.","attributes":["white dial","black Roman numerals","black hands","dark scalloped frame","glossy/reflective finish","analog","wall-mounted","slightly blurred","low resolution"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.0}
